title: Clean View
description: Removes the vignette effect from your screen.
body:
The mod provides the option to disable the vignette effect, which is the darker circle that appears around the edges of your display. Please note that the red vignette that appears when you approach the border will still be visible; however, you can easily disable it in the configuration if you prefer.

![On the left side, you'll see the standard version, while on the right side, you can observe the version with the mod.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Vkp3kF4O/images/de23df7c21cbafba10371be1904349873964b220.png)
